mapper.insert: insert into student_reflection_ai_analysis (reflection_id, student_id, counselor_id, overall_analysis, keywords, sentiment_positive, sentiment_neutral, sentiment_negative, score_details, total_score, grade, analysis_report, ai_model_code, analysis_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{reflectionId}, #{studentId}, #{counselorId}, #{overallAnalysis}, #{keywords, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{sentimentPositive}, #{sentimentNeutral}, #{sentimentNegative}, #{scoreDetails, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonMapObjectTypeHandler}, #{totalScore}, #{grade}, #{analysisReport}, #{aiModelCode}, #{analysisTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select sraa.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from student_reflection_ai_analysis sraa left join student_users su on sraa.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sraa.counselor_id = tu.id where sraa.id = #{id}

select sraa.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from student_reflection_ai_analysis sraa left join student_users su on sraa.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sraa.counselor_id = tu.id where sraa.reflection_id = #{reflectionId}

select sraa.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from student_reflection_ai_analysis sraa left join student_users su on sraa.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sraa.counselor_id = tu.id where sraa.student_id = #{studentId} order by sraa.analysis_time desc limit 1

select sraa.*, su.id as su_id, su.name as su_name, su.student_user_id as su_student_user_id, su.grade as su_grade, tu.id as tu_id, tu.name as tu_name, tu.teacher_user_id as tu_teacher_user_id from student_reflection_ai_analysis sraa left join student_users su on sraa.student_id = su.id left join teacher_users tu on sraa.counselor_id = tu.id where sraa.counselor_id = #{counselorId} order by sraa.analysis_time desc
mapper.update:
update student_reflection_ai_analysis
overall_analysis = #{overallAnalysis},
keywords = #{keywords, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonListTypeHandler},
sentiment_positive = #{sentimentPositive},
sentiment_neutral = #{sentimentNeutral},
sentiment_negative = #{sentimentNegative},
score_details = #{scoreDetails, typeHandler=com.gdmu.handler.JsonMapObjectTypeHandler},
total_score = #{totalScore},
grade = #{grade},
analysis_report = #{analysisReport},
ai_model_code = #{aiModelCode},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
